title: Add clickable product image with Meesho affiliate redirect

requirements.summary: Add the uploaded product image (ms_dxrpu_512_613389026.jpg) to the product browsing page below the existing content sections
acceptanceCriteria: The uploaded t-shirt product image is displayed on the ProductBrowse page
The image appears below the existing SwipeableGallery and CategoryImageSection components
The image maintains proper aspect ratio and responsive sizing

file_operations.description: Add a new MeeshoProductSection component below the CategoryImageSection that displays the uploaded product image (frontend/public/assets/ms_dxrpu_512_613389026.jpg) with responsive sizing and proper aspect ratio handling. Use the useImageLoader hook for loading states and LoadingTimeout component for error handling, following the same pattern as CategoryImageSection.

Create a new component that displays the product image from frontend/public/assets/ms_dxrpu_512_613389026.jpg within a responsive container. Use the useImageLoader hook to manage image loading states and include LoadingTimeout component for timeout handling. Apply responsive classes for proper aspect ratio and sizing across different screen sizes.

requirements.summary: Make the product image clickable and redirect to the Meesho affiliate URL when clicked
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the product image opens the Meesho affiliate link in a new tab
The full URL with all query parameters is preserved in the redirect
Visual affordance (hover effect or cursor change) indicates the image is clickable

file_operations.description: Wrap the product image in a clickable anchor tag that opens the exact URL https://www.meesho.com/af_invite/234223027:instagram_stories:2007896?p_id=613389026&ext_id=a57202&utm_source=instagram_stories in a new tab (target='_blank' with rel='noopener noreferrer'). Add hover effects (scale transform, cursor pointer) and an optional overlay or icon to indicate the image is clickable.
